title: ebenus foliosa
side_effects: Ebenus foliosa can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, respiratory problems, and gastrointestinal issues. Ingesting high doses of the plant's extract can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Prolonged use or excessive consumption may cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue, while in rare cases, it can trigger seizures or irregular heartbeat. Additionally, it may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, exacerbating their side effects.
